name: Down To Earth AI
description: Done-for-you AI receptionist and lead generation service built specifically for UK tradesmen. Down To Earth AI is NOT software — the team handles all setup, configuration, and ongoing maintenance. The tradesman does not install, configure, or manage anything.

service_model.description: Down To Earth AI is a fully managed service. The team sets everything up, maintains it, and updates business information as needed on an ongoing basis. The tradesman does not need to install, configure, or manage anything.
service_model.setup: Configured and live in under 24 hours
service_model.maintenance: Ongoing — the team updates business information, service details, and configurations as needed

founder.name: Jeff Morton
founder.experience: 25 years running UK trade businesses (landscape gardening, building maintenance, tree surgery)

products.name: AI Receptionist
products.description: AI-powered phone answering and messaging for UK tradesmen. Answers calls, texts, and messages 24/7.

products.name: Lead Generation Website
products.description: SEO websites scaled to your services and coverage area — every service × every area = a dedicated ranking page on Google.

products.name: AI Marketing
products.description: Photos-in, content-out marketing automation for tradesmen.

products.name: Custom AI Automations
products.description: Bespoke AI workflows tailored to how each trade business operates.

key_facts.guarantee: Full 30-day money-back guarantee — if not 100% happy after 30 days, the customer receives a complete refund of BOTH the setup fee AND the monthly cost. No questions asked.
key_facts.contracts: No contracts, no minimum terms, cancel anytime
